class.name: eidos::GpsFactor
class.description: GPS factor. Provides BiasedGPSFactor constraints from GNSS data.

class.name: eidos::EuclideanDistanceLoopClosureFactor
class.description: Euclidean distance-based loop closure. Detects loops via KD-tree radius search and validates with ICP alignment.

class.name: eidos::LisoFactor
class.description: LiDAR-Inertial Submap Odometry. GICP scan-to-submap matching with graph BFS submap assembly.
